The '''Third Battle of Mobetta''' was a [[Realspace/Legends|space]] battle between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It saw the conclusion of the refit of the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Dreadnaught-class)|''Peregrine'']] with the [[Compellor|''Compeller'''s]] [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]].

==The battle==
The earlier attack resulted in a total craft loss for the Imperial patrol deployed there. As a result, the Empire doubled its caution in that area and deployed a larger strike force to look out for both the ''[[Compellor]]'' and the missing patrol.

[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]] and [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadrons]] were tasked with protecting the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 Factory]] ''[[Gallofree]]'', the [[Modified Strike Cruiser|modified ''Strike''-class cruiser]], and the vulnerable [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|interdictor]] ''Compellor'' while the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] ''[[Electro]]'' boarded the ''Peregrine'' to implement the finishing touches.

The Imperial attack consisted of [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|escort transports]] armed with [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]], targeting any major ship or station, plus the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] [[Tyrant (escort carrier)|''Tyrant'']] with a full complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptors]], and [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]].

While the ''Tyrant''{{'s}} fighters kept Rogue and Green Squadrons occupied, three [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transports]] of [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] Omicron launched from the flight deck in another attempt to secure the interdictor for the Empire.

Eventually though, the Empire's pilots were defeated by Rogue Squadron, and the only lightly armed and armored escort carrier quickly fell prey to Green Squadron's [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]].

==Aftermath==
The victory was an important one for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]]. While the search group the Empire mounted this time was a bit stronger than the previous one, it was still relatively weak and easily dispatched by the two Rebel squadrons.

The important part was that the Alliance refitted one of their fast cruisers with [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] technology, effectively granting them their first ship with interdiction capability—the ''Compellor'' had served its purpose now and was left a dead hulk beside the ''Gallofree'', loaded with explosives.

Now, the Rebels could plot their next moves against [[Task Force Vengeance]].
